title: Inventory Count
subtitle: Physical count sessions with variance reconciliation. Counts are memo-only until the backend JE splice ships.
empty_description: Create a count session for a location, snapshot the current item quantities, record physical counts, then reconcile to see variance vs. system.
error_variance_shape: Failed to compute variance JE shape.

toast.snapshot_done: Snapshot captured. Enter counted quantities per line.
toast.reconciled: Reconciled. Review the variance JE shape before posting.

detail.label: COUNT SESSION
detail.draft_empty_description: Click Snapshot above to capture current inventory quantities into this count session. After snapshot, line-level counted quantities become editable.
detail.no_items_description: Snapshot captured no items. Add inventory items to the catalog before creating a count.

table.error_qty_format: Quantity must be a non-negative decimal with up to 2 dp.

variance_drawer.label: VARIANCE JE SHAPE
variance_drawer.title: Reconciliation JE preview
variance_drawer.posting_deferred_note: Note: the actual JE posting fires after a follow-up backend dispatch ships. The shape above shows the legs the variance JE will include.

create_modal.label: NEW COUNT
create_modal.title: Create count session
create_modal.lifecycle_hint: Lifecycle: DRAFT → snapshot → COUNTING → reconcile → RECONCILED → post (deferred backend).
create_modal.error_generic: Failed to create count. Please try again.
